final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and connect it to GLMCodingPlan, with clear numbered steps 1-2-3-4.

Style/medium: infographic, step-by-step tutorial diagram
Composition: vertical flow layout with 4 numbered sections
Subject: Docker deployment process for Hermes and GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: clean technical documentation layout
Lighting/mood: clear, instructional, easy to follow
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: flat design icons, code snippets, terminal screenshots
Text (verbatim): "1", "2", "3", "4", "docker", "hermes", "glmcodingplan"
Constraints: must show 4 distinct steps with visual hierarchy
Avoid:
